name: Remoulade Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix mayonnaise and Durkee's Famous Sauce.
2. Gradually pour in olive oil while beating until the mixture thickens.
3. Add creole or poupon mustard and beat again.
4. Incorporate horseradish, ketchup, wine vinegar, Lea & Perrins, and Louisiana hot sauce one at a time, beating after each addition.
5. Use the sauce over shrimp on salad or as a sandwich sauce.
